title: KeroCraft
description: Vanilla-compatible Fabric modpack for the KeroCraft survival server. 63 mods, 22 resource packs, 3 shaders — better performance, immersive audio, quality of life, and beautiful visuals without changing gameplay. Everything optional!
body:
# KeroCraft

The official client modpack for the **KeroCraft** survival server — a curated collection of Fabric mods that enhance performance, visuals, and quality of life without changing vanilla gameplay.

## What's included

### Performance (16 mods)
Sodium, Lithium, ModernFix, ImmediatelyFast, Ferrite Core, Entity Culling, and more. Expect **2-3x FPS** over vanilla with no gameplay changes.

### Visuals & Audio (14 mods)
Sound Physics Remastered, Presence Footsteps, Falling Leaves, Ambient Sounds, 3D Skin Layers, Continuity, LambDynamicLights, Not Enough Animations, and more for a fully immersive experience.

### Quality of Life (10 mods)
Xaero's Minimap + World Map, EMI recipe browser, Inventory Profiles Next, Jade tooltips, Zoomify, Appleskin, BetterF3, Mouse Tweaks, and more.

### Social (3 mods)
- **Simple Voice Chat** — proximity 3D spatial voice chat (syncs with server)
- **Emotecraft** — custom player emotes (syncs with server)
- **Chat Heads** — player faces next to chat messages

### Resource Packs (22 included)
Faithful 32x & 64x, Fresh Animations + Extensions, Dramatic Skys, Better Leaves, Enhanced Boss Bars, Low On Fire, Fancy Crops, Beautiful Enchanted Books, and more. All optional — toggle on/off in Options → Resource Packs.

### Shaders (3 included)
Complementary Reimagined, BSL Shaders, and Super Duper Vanilla. Enable via Options → Video Settings → Shader Packs.

## Server features

The KeroCraft server runs Paper with world generation by **Terralith**, **Tectonic**, **Structory**, and **Dungeons & Taverns** — plus a fully overhauled Nether (Incendium) and End (Nullscape). Over **1,200 custom advancements** via BlazeandCave's.

RPG progression through **AuraSkills** and **LevelledMobs**, land claiming with **GriefPrevention**, and live maps via **BlueMap**, **squaremap**, and **Dynmap**.

## Notes
- **100% vanilla-compatible** — no gameplay-altering mods
- Client-side only — install and connect to any server
- All resource packs and shaders are bundled but optional
